zh.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Morgan是Sir Morgan the Rebel of Glamorgan ap Meredith和Gwenllian verch Daffyd的女兒，於1290年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾。她於1322年與Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manor在威爾士卡馬特史爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1334年在威爾士蒙姆爾蒙姆斯享年44歲，埋葬在威爾士蒙姆爾蒙姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Morgan是Sir Morgan the Rebel of Glamorgan ap Meredith和Gwenllian verch Daffyd的女儿，于1290年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾。她于1322年与Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manor在威尔士卡馬特史爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1334年在威尔士蒙姆爾蒙姆斯享年44岁，埋葬在威尔士蒙姆爾蒙姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Morgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): from the medieval Welsh personal name Morgan, Morgant (Old Welsh Morcant, of uncertain etymology).
Irish: importation of the Welsh surname (see 1 above), to which has been assimilated more than one Gaelic surname, notably Ó Muireagáin (see Merrigan ).
Scottish: probably from a Gaelic personal name cognate with Welsh Morcant.

variants.name: Merrigan
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muireagáin ‘descendant of Muireagán’ a personal name derived from muir ‘sea’. Compare Morgan , with which this name has been confused.

variants.name: Morgans
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): variant of Morgan , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Angharad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Celtic intensive prefix an- + cār ‘love’ + the noun suffix -ad. This was the name of the mother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’). In the Mabinogi, Angharad Golden Hand at first rejects Peredur's suit, but later falls in love with him when he comes back as the unknown Mute Knight. The name has been strongly revived in Wales since the 1940s, borne, for example, by the actress Angharad Rees ( 1949-2012 ).

en.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Morgan was born in 1290, in Monmouthshire, Wales as the daughter of Sir Morgan the Rebel of Glamorgan ap Meredith and Gwenllian verch Daffyd. She married Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manor in 1322, in Carmarthenshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1334, in Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Wales, at the age of 44, and was buried in Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Morgan est née en 1290, à Monmouthshire, Galles, fille de Sir Morgan the Rebel of Glamorgan ap Meredith et Gwenllian verch Daffyd. Elle a épousé Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manor en 1322, à Carmarthenshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1334, à Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Galles, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Morgan wurde 1290 in Monmouthshire, Wales, als Tochter von Sir Morgan the Rebel of Glamorgan ap Meredith und Gwenllian verch Daffyd geboren. Sie hat 1322 in Carmarthenshire, Wales Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1334 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Wales und wurde in Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Wales begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Morganは1290年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアでSir Morgan the Rebel of Glamorgan ap MeredithとGwenllian verch Daffydの娘として生まれた。1322年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアでLlywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1334年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアモンモウスで44歳で死去し，ウェールズモンモウスシュアイアモンモウスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Morgan(은)는 1290년 웨일스 몬모우스실르에서 Sir Morgan the Rebel of Glamorgan ap Meredith(와)과 Gwenllian verch Daffyd의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1322년 웨일스 카마테실르에서 Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1334년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 몬모우스에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 몬모우스실르 몬모우스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Morgan nasceu em 1290, em Monmouthshire, Gales filha de Sir Morgan the Rebel of Glamorgan ap Meredith e Gwenllian verch Daffyd. Ela casou-se com Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manor em 1322, em Carmarthenshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1334, em Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Gales, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Morgan родилась в 1290 г. в местности монмоутшир, Уэльс. Её родителей звали Sir Morgan the Rebel of Glamorgan ap Meredith и Gwenllian verch Daffyd. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manor в 1322 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1334 г. в местности монмоут, монмоутшир, Уэльс в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности монмоут, монмоутшир, Уэльс.

Se casó con Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manor en 1322, en Carmarthenshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1334, en Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Gales, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultada en Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Gales.
